3159910.name: Cat City: A story About Dreams Demo
3159910.description:
Do you have any dreams…? Or at least something you really want to do in your life? Well, what if I told you that there’s a yellow kitty out there with no dreams at all, would you believe me?

In order to change that, Throy is about to do everything in his power to find a dream for himself! And the best part is that YOU are going to take part in this adventure as well by helping him out throughout his journey!

Want to know more? So check this out:

In “Cat City: A Story About Dreams”, a modern Point N’ Click game, you’ll follow the story of a young cat named Throy and his search for a dream to pursue. Along the way, he’ll meet new friends, face several challenges and create fond memories of his long and arduous journey.

Besides that, you’ll also find:

-Three scenes from different moments of the game.

Think you might be able to connect the pieces and find out what’s going on?

-Teddy bears!

Lots of them! At least one in each scenario, we challenge you to find them all!

-An Easter Egg from the devs.

For the secret-hunting lovers out there!

So, what are you waiting for?

Come join and help us complete this unfinished story… about dreams!
3159910.supported_languages:
英语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
